title: API Design Principles
snippet: All public APIs must follow REST conventions with consistent resource naming, proper HTTP verb usage, and structured error responses.

title: API Versioning Strategy
snippet: Use URL-based versioning (v1, v2) for breaking changes. Minor additions are backward-compatible and do not require a new version.

title: API Authentication Guide
snippet: All API endpoints require Bearer token authentication. Tokens are issued via the /auth/token endpoint with a 1-hour TTL.

title: API Pagination Patterns
snippet: Use cursor-based pagination for list endpoints. Offset pagination is acceptable only for admin/internal APIs with small result sets.

title: API Error Handling
snippet: All errors return a JSON body with 'code', 'message', and optional 'details' array. HTTP status codes follow RFC 7231.
